name: Profile_R5_ClinicalUseDefinition_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.ClinicalUseDefinition resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 ClinicalUseDefinition resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.ClinicalUseDefinition resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 ClinicalUseDefinition resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: R5: indication | contraindication | interaction | undesirable-effect | warning (new)
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.type` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ClinicalUseDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.type` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: A categorisation of the issue, primarily for dividing warnings into subject heading areas such as "Pregnancy", "Overdose" (new)
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.category` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ClinicalUseDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.category` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Whether this is a current issue or one that has been retired etc (new)
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ClinicalUseDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
An externally-defined extension that has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `ClinicalUseDefinition.status`: `http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/artifact-status`.

element.short: R5: Specifics for when this is a contraindication (new)
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.contraindication` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ClinicalUseDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.contraindication` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Information about use of the product in relation to other therapies described as part of the contraindication (new)
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.contraindication.otherTherapy` is part of an existing definition because parent element `ClinicalUseDefinition.contraindication` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.contraindication.otherTherapy` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ClinicalUseDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.contraindication.otherTherapy` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Specifics for when this is an indication (new)
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.indication` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ClinicalUseDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.indication` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Specifics for when this is an interaction (new)
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.interaction` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ClinicalUseDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.interaction` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The population group to which this applies (new)
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.population` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ClinicalUseDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.population` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Logic used by the clinical use definition (new)
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.library` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ClinicalUseDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.library` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: A possible negative outcome from the use of this treatment (new)
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.undesirableEffect` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ClinicalUseDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.undesirableEffect` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Critical environmental, health or physical risks or hazards. For example 'Do not operate heavy machinery', 'May cause drowsiness' (new)
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.warning` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ClinicalUseDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.warning` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
